title: Export Bundles
description: Packaging and export engine that assembles agent kits from pipeline run outputs. Maps rendered documents to 12 domain slots via SUBDIR_TO_SLOT, generates kit metadata files (START_HERE, MANIFEST, INDEX, VERSIONS, RUN_RULES, PROOF_LOG), copies core artifacts, produces packaging_manifest.json with SHA-256 hashes, and writes entrypoint.json and version_stamp.json.
notes: buildRealKit is the primary entrypoint. packageKit and validateKit are stubs (NotImplementedError). CLI cmdExportBundle is also a stub.
